name: image_captioning
what_it_does:
A AI explain Details in the Image
This project is an image analysis chatbot that can:
- Detect objects in images using YOLO
- Extract text from images using OCR (Tesseract)
- Generate captions for images using BLIP
- Answer questions about the image content
key_features: Detects objects in images using YOLO
Extracts text from images using OCR (Tesseract)
Generates captions for images using BLIP
